description_for_human: Interactive sample app for DATPAQ image-processing requests.
description_for_model: Use this app to demonstrate GET /v1/image-processing with x-api-key authentication. It supports URL/inline image input, conversion/resize/compress/crop parameter profiles, and renders loading, empty, error, and success states with copyable request URL and JSON output.

query_parameters.name: image
query_parameters.description: Inline image value. Provide if image_url is not supplied.

query_parameters.name: image_url
query_parameters.description: HTTP/HTTPS URL of source image. Provide if image is not supplied.

sample_app_features: Required API key input and validation
Optional preview rendering when image URL/base64 is present
